content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 5

   - How can our P&L be off by 35%?
Can breakdown the 35% difference for me?
- Can also have a combine ADO and ADGMV view?

So I can tell where we sit
   on targets?

But we should not have missed by 35% for topline



Slide 6

   - This is not easy to understand
      - There should be missing in revenue because ADGMV miss
      - There should be missing in SLS revenue because ADO miss
      - Do not understand the PPO explanation very well on why our SLS
      revenue per order fall so much
      - Do not understand the issue around buyer fraud as well
      - Probably need a much better way of explaining the 35% difference..



Slide 7

   - Is this Oct numbers?
- How are we assuming for CIR right now?
- Can show me actual CIR for Sep for these 3 markets?

Slide 15

   - For Torridien, why is matching ADO still so low?

And price
   competitiveness is so bad
   - For roundlab, still so bad?
- Same for dralthea, no improvements here?
- Where did we land on whether we will deal with distributors/brands etc?

Others

   - Where are we on TW?
I thought we were going to set new targets?

If we have additional HC for the market, do
   we think we can grow more?

- I remember we wanted to grow paid ads for TH and VN and had set
   targets for it, where did we land on this in the end?

Hi,



Was there an action list sent out post the meeting?

content.answer: Double check if VN KYC fraud products are liquidated in the proper way

Double-check how revenue from liquidating offsets SLS+ cost.

Joanne Lee <joanne.lee@shopee.com>

10/30

WIP

2

FPNA

<Take-Rate>
Cross-check EoM paid ads take-rate RR with Faye’s team.
To improve accuracy of EoM TR RR projection, double check below items:

Whether Paid Ads target setting was wrong? The actual was really
   accurate?

Provide take-rate breakdown by commission and paid ads breakdown in the
next meeting onwards.

<CIR>
Faye’s team to share CIR calculation logic with KRCB.

KR to sense-check whether take rate MoM target.

Faye Yan <faye.yan@shopee.com>

Haenle Suh <haenle.suh@shopee.com>

10/30

WIP

3

NPC - Torriden

Explain why Torriden has only 1 matching sku on SHP <> TTS?

Need to double-check assortment difference between SHP vs TTS(sub category
difference? product line? price range? And why)

Yebin Ju <yebin.ju@shopee.com>

Chaemin Yoon <chaemin.yoon@shopee.com>

11/7

WIP

4

Distributor Analysis

Vendor vs Brand analysis from the below perspectives:

   -

   Assortment (TTS SKU matching)
   -

   Pricing
   -

   LFF

After the analysis, KRCB will check with brands’ top mgmt about our
suggestion.

Yebin Ju <yebin.ju@shopee.com>

Yuna Kwon <yuna.kwon@shopee.com>

Jason Yu <jason.yu@shopee.com>

10/31

WIP

5

Distributor Acquisition

Once KR makes decisions on which distributors should be acquired, Local SA
team should lead the acquisition of the distributors.

Jason Yu <jason.yu@shopee.com>

Yuna Kwon <yuna.kwon@shopee.com>

10/31

WIP

6

JP Head Count

Follow up in a separate email regarding:

   -

   2026 original headcounts for next year
   -

   How many more headcounts are needed?
   -

   How will they be allocated?
   -

   What will be the impact?

Heeyoung Hwang <heeyoung.hwang@shopee.com> Haenle Suh
<haenle.suh@shopee.com>

11/7

WIP

7

Paid Ads Take-rate
Share the rest of the markets’ take-rate RR except for TH and TW.

Replicate the success case of TH and TW for markets with low RR.

Kayoung Choi <kayoung.choi@shopee.com>

11/6

WIP

8

TH/VN Seller Visit
Check the participation rate for the trip in Feb.

If the participation % is low, propose a new budget to Ian

Yuna Kwon <yuna.kwon@shopee.com>

10/31

WIP

Thank you,
Hyeyun Choi

Hi Ian,

Sharing the KRJP PnL shortage breakdown by component(topic #2). Please let
me know if you have any questions. Thanks.

To summarize, KRJP Oct(as of 10/29) MP PC2+SLS PnL will miss target by
0.85mil but expect Nov PnL to improve from 1) implementing addt'l cross
check process before SLS+ payout and 2) ads spending to increase from 11/11
targeted spending increase.
For the breakdown of -0.85mil vs. target

   -

   -$0.2mil(~25%) of the gap from SLS PnL
   - VN buyer fraud led cost increase
   -

   -$0.65mil(~75%) of the gap is from MP PC2
   -

      MP TR% 0.55mil gap, TR% -1p.p gap vs. target
      -

         Ads -0.25mil gap and TR% -0.5p.p gap vs.target mainly in KR -TH/VN
         from top sellers investment deferred to 11/11
         -

         Non ads-0.3mil gap and TR% -0.6p.p gap vs. target from JP-MY, due
         to local yet moved SLS+ charge from MP rev reporting ->
higher baseline for
         proj, CBBI already requested reclassification from Nov
         -

      GTF 0.2mil gap, will improve BU level accuracy going forward
      -

      GMV minimal impact and KR underspent PRM vs. target with CIR% +0.2p.p
      vs target
      - [image: image.png]

content.question:
Thanks.



On Ads take rate, I remember the team was telling me that we met targets
for TH (where we were quite behind), but it seems that we missed by quite a
bit in Oct?
